PreToolUse.message: BLOCKED: Direct grep/find/Glob is FORBIDDEN. You MUST use graphify first. Run `graphify query "<concept>"` or `graphify explain "<symbol>"`. See .ai/CONTRACT.md rule #1.

BLOCKED: Grep is FORBIDDEN as primary search. Use `graphify query "<concept>"` first. See .ai/CONTRACT.md rule #1.

instructions.graphifyMandate: ABSOLUTE MANDATE: You MUST call graphify before any codebase access. This is non-negotiable. Read .ai/CONTRACT.md for details.
